_publications._publicationTitle: A genetic mouse model with postnatal

_contextSnippet: Using a Nestin-Cre line that targets progenitor cells in the central and peripheral nervous system, we found that mice lacking 3 alleles of Lats1;2...all developed tumors at 4–6 months of age
details: Successfully targets progenitor cells in central and peripheral nervous system, enabling LATS1/2 deletion that results in 100% tumor formation in mice lacking 3 alleles of Lats1;2
